new_value: Fixed forward_mesh_to_upstream to branch on is_local_mesh+dst extraction and call mesh_to_mesh path (instead of TUN/drop) for local-mesh packets. Added RplNode::lookup_route delegation, mesh_to_mesh stub (with SRH TODO), updated is_local_mesh docs. cargo check+test passed cleanly. Completed mandatory 3 codereview passes (9+ beads filed as codereview: trmo/f05s/d7x3/9bp4/6euj/c5b4/tmnr + priors from u9in/cag9). Remaining P1/P2 filed as follow-ups under epic.
